metadata.description: Enhanced blog creation and optimization tools for Claude Code - E-E-A-T ready

plugins.name: claude-blog-enhanced
plugins.description: AI-powered blog creation, optimization, and management with 30 sub-skills, 5 agents, 13 content templates (including E-E-A-T), FLOW framework integration, semantic topic-cluster execution, multilingual publishing, brand and discourse context auto-load, and 5-category 100-point scoring. Optimized for Google rankings (December 2025 Core Update, E-E-A-T) and AI citations (GEO/AEO).
